title: Silex rusar 100 procent i debuten – hör vd:n
summary_md:
# Silex rusar 100 procent i debuten – hör vd:n

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-05-07  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode covers the spectacular Nasdaq Stockholm debut of MEMS-chip foundry Silex Microsystems, whose shares doubled (+100%) on day one before trading was halted, with interviews of founder/CEO Edvard Kelvestén and owner Patrik Tygerskjöld. Discussion centres on Silex's world-leading position in advanced MEMS (optical switch chips for AI datacenters), its US expansion plans, customer concentration, and the wind-down of the former Chinese owner's stake. Commentators are enthusiastic about the company's quality but caution that the rich IPO valuation leaves little risk margin, drawing parallels to Yubico's disappointing post-listing performance.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟠 SILEX — Silex Microsystems | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 50%

World-leading MEMS foundry with strong AI/datacenter exposure and US expansion, but debut doubled the price leaving a stretched valuation and thin risk margin.

#### Reasoning

Silex is a genuinely high-quality, world-leading pure-play MEMS foundry with deep engineering moat (~200 MEMS engineers, 25 yrs experience), 17% CAGR over 10 years, and key AI-datacenter optical switch chips. However the +100% debut implies a richer-than-Swedish-context valuation; owner Tygerskjöld himself stresses a young growth company won't move in a straight line and needs risk margin. High customer concentration (3-4 large clients) and residual Chinese ownership add caveats. Quality is clea

#### Sell Triggers

- if the company fails to live up to elevated post-IPO expectations
- if the US fabric build-out is delayed or blocked by regulators
- if a top customer is lost (high customer concentration)
- if the Chinese stake sell-down disrupts the share price

> *"Det är en tillväxtfas. Ibland har man segrar och ibland går det i motgång. Man måste vara lite ödmjuk... det måste ju finnas en riskmarginal i kurssättningen också för att allting inte alltid går 100% rätt."*

---

### 🟡 YUBICO — Yubico | **HOLD** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Raised as a warning: a previously listed Tygerskjöld company that the market found hard to understand and that failed to meet expectations, with weak recent performance.

#### Reasoning

Yubico is invoked only as a cautionary parallel to Silex, not analysed on its own merits. The implied directional view is negative: a complex business the market mis-understood, where reality failed to live up to the expectation set at listing and the share has lagged recently. No fresh fundamentals discussed, hence low conviction.

#### Sell Triggers

- if guidance again misses expectations
- if product complexity continues to confuse the market

> *"Sen har väl bolaget kanske inte riktigt sista tiden gått som man trodde heller så att säga."*

---
